testcase.name: LoginErrorValidation

failure.message: expected [AUTOMATION Automation Practice HOME ORDERS Cart Sign Out Home | Search Filters Price Range Categories fashion electronics household Sub Categories t-shirts shirts shoes mobiles laptops Search For men women Showing 3 results | User can only see maximum 9 products on a page ADIDAS ORIGINAL $ 11500 View Add To Cart ZARA COAT 3 $ 11500 View Add To Cart IPHONE 13 PRO $ 55000 View Add To Cart Previous page You're on page 1 Next page Design and Developed By - Kunal Sharma] but found [Incorrect email or password.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [AUTOMATION Automation Practice HOME ORDERS Cart Sign Out Home | Search Filters Price Range Categories fashion electronics household Sub Categories t-shirts shirts shoes mobiles laptops Search For men women Showing 3 results | User can only see maximum 9 products on a page ADIDAS ORIGINAL $ 11500 View Add To Cart ZARA COAT 3 $ 11500 View Add To Cart IPHONE 13 PRO $ 55000 View Add To Cart Previous page You're on page 1 Next page Design and Developed By - Kunal Sharma] but found [Incorrect email or password.] at Ecommerce.test.ErrorValidationTest.LoginErrorValidation(ErrorValidationTest.java:17) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 31 stack frames
